title: Access Control Policy
description: The organization establishes and maintains an access control policy.

title: User Account Management
description: User accounts are created approved and maintained following a formal process.

title: Password Requirements
description: Passwords must be at least 12 characters and meet complexity requirements.

title: Multi-Factor Authentication
description: MFA is required for all privileged access and remote access.

title: Access Reviews
description: User access rights are reviewed quarterly and revoked when no longer needed.
